positive: A highly detailed, stylized minimalist illustration of a crescent moon cradling a geometric constellation of abstract, glowing planets. The planets and stars are rendered as clean, thick white lines and simple solid shapes (triangles, circles, squares) against a deep, cosmic midnight blue and indigo gradient background. Use a strong two-tone color palette: stark white against deep Prussian blue, with neon cyan accents for glow effects. The composition must be perfectly centered and highly symmetrical. The overall aesthetic should evoke celestial wonder and sophisticated modern design, perfect for apparel printing, featuring clean silhouettes and bold, graphic outlines. Vector art style, linocut texture quality, highly contrasting.
negative: photo, blurry, messy, noise, text, watermark, logo, signature, extra limbs, low detail, bad anatomy, dirty, grain, realistic, analog photograph
